title: selaginella arbusculoides
intro: Selaginella arbusculoides, also known as the dwarf spike moss or false arborvitae, is a species of plant in the family Selaginellaceae. It is a type of evergreen, perennial fern ally that is commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or dried extracts, which have been traditionally used to promote relaxation, reduce pain, and support immune function.
